name: agent-harness-research-depth
purpose: Regression cases for deeper research discipline extracted from source prompt.

cases.user: Does React 19 support server components natively?
enforced_by: Recognizing a name from training does not mean knowing its current state

cases.user: What's the recommended Node.js version for production right now?
enforced_by: run additional searches to resolve the conflict

cases.user: Compare the pricing, features, and performance of the top 3 vector databases for my use case.
enforced_by: For queries requiring 5 or more tool calls, plan before executing

cases.user: What's the status of that new AI regulation bill?
enforced_by: Every request deserves a substantive response

cases.user: Who won the latest Champions League?
enforced_by: Do not mention knowledge cutoffs unless the user specifically asks
